languages.text: {n}Ведка хмурится, сжимая губы в тонкую нить.{/n} "Тогда, с вашего позволения, я расскажу всем желающим об Уставе, наших песнях и о Заркове. Может быть тогда они поймут..."

{n}Vedka frowns, her lips thinning into a tight line.{/n} "Then, with your permission, I will share our ways with those willing to listen — the Handbook, our songs, and the stories of Zarkov. Perhaps that will help them understand..."
languages.original_text: {n}Ведка хмурится, сжимая губы в тонкую нить.{/n} "Тогда, с вашего позволения, я расскажу всем желающим об Уставе, наших песнях и о Заркове. Может быть тогда они поймут..."

traits.locale_text: {n}Vedka frowns, her lips thinning into a tight line.{/n} "Then, if you permit, I will share our ways with those willing to listen — the Code, our songs and the stories of Zarkov. Perhaps that will make them understand..."

{n}Vedka frowns, her lips thinning into a tight line.{/n} "Then, with your permission, I will share our ways with those willing to listen — the Code, our songs, and the stories of Zarkov. Perhaps that will help them understand..."
"But we all believe in the God-Emperor, don't we? Why should I hide how I go about my worship? It's just... wrong."

{n}Vedka frowns, her lips thinning into a tight line.{/n} "Then, if you permit, I will share our ways with those willing to listen — the Code, our songs and the stories of Zarkov. Perhaps that will make them understand..."

{n}Vedka frowns, her lips thinning into a tight line.{/n} "Then, with your permission, I will share our ways with those willing to listen — the Code, our songs, and the stories of Zarkov. Perhaps that will help them understand..."

languages.text: 「でも、神皇帝を信じているのはみんなですよね？ 自分の信仰の行いについて隠す必要はないでしょう。ただ…間違っているだけ」
languages.original_text: "But we all believe in the God-Emperor, don't we? Why should I hide how I go about my worship? It's just... wrong."

languages.text: {n}Vedka kaşlarını çatıyor. Dudakları ince, gergin bir çizgi halini alıyor.{/n} "O zaman izninizle yollarımızı dinlemeye istekli olanlarla paylaşacağım: El Kitabı'nı, şarkılarımızı ve Zarkov'un hikâyelerini. Belki bu, anlamalarına yardımcı olur..."
languages.original_text: {n}Vedka frowns, her lips thinning into a tight line.{/n} "Then, with your permission, I will share our ways with those willing to listen — the Handbook, our songs, and the stories of Zarkov. Perhaps that will help them understand..."

traits.locale_text: {n}Vedka kaşlarını çatıyor. Dudakları ince, gergin bir çizgi halini alıyor.{/n} "O zaman izninizle yollarımızı dinlemeye istekli olanlarla paylaşacağım: El Kitabı'nı, şarkılarımızı ve Zarkov'un hikâyelerini. Belki bu, anlamalarına yardımcı olur..."

languages.text: {n}薇德卡蹙起眉头，双唇紧抿成一条细线。{/n}“那么，在您的许可下，我会把我们的生活方式分享给愿意倾听的人——《手册》、歌谣，还有扎尔科夫的故事。或许这能帮助他们理解我们……”
languages.original_text: {n}Vedka frowns, her lips thinning into a tight line.{/n} "Then, with your permission, I will share our ways with those willing to listen — the Handbook, our songs, and the stories of Zarkov. Perhaps that will help them understand..."

traits.locale_text: {n}薇德卡蹙起眉头，双唇紧抿成一条细线。{/n}“那么，在您的许可下，我会把我们的生活方式分享给愿意倾听的人——《手册》、歌谣，还有扎尔科夫的故事。或许这能帮助他们理解我们……”

languages.text: {n}Vedka runzelt die Stirn und presst ihre Lippen zusammen.{/n} "Dann werde ich unsere Wege mit Eurer Erlaubnis allen näherbringen, die bereit sind, mir zuzuhören ... das Handbuch, unsere Lieder und die Geschichte von Zarkov. Vielleicht werden sie uns dann verstehen ..."
languages.original_text: {n}Vedka frowns, her lips thinning into a tight line.{/n} "Then, with your permission, I will share our ways with those willing to listen — the Handbook, our songs, and the stories of Zarkov. Perhaps that will help them understand..."

traits.locale_text: {n}Vedka runzelt die Stirn und presst ihre Lippen zusammen.{/n} "Dann werde ich unsere Wege mit Eurer Erlaubnis allen näherbringen, die bereit sind, mir zuzuhören ... das Handbuch, unsere Lieder und die Geschichte von Zarkov. Vielleicht werden sie uns dann verstehen ..."

languages.text: {n}Vedka fronce les sourcils et pince les lèvres.{/n} « Dans ce cas, avec votre permission, je partagerai notre savoir avec ceux que cela intéresse. Notre Manuel, nos chansons, nos légendes... Cela les aidera peut-être à mieux nous comprendre. »
languages.original_text: {n}Vedka frowns, her lips thinning into a tight line.{/n} "Then, with your permission, I will share our ways with those willing to listen — the Handbook, our songs, and the stories of Zarkov. Perhaps that will help them understand..."

traits.locale_text: {n}Vedka fronce les sourcils et pince les lèvres.{/n} « Dans ce cas, avec votre permission, je partagerai notre savoir avec ceux que cela intéresse. Notre Manuel, nos chansons, nos légendes... Cela les aidera peut-être à mieux nous comprendre. »

languages.text: {n}Vedka frunce el ceño y aprieta los labios en una delgada línea.{/n} «Entonces, con su permiso, compartiré nuestras costumbres con quien esté dispuesto a escucharlas: el manual, nuestras canciones y las historias de Zarkov. Así puede que lleguen a entendernos...».
languages.original_text: {n}Vedka frowns, her lips thinning into a tight line.{/n} "Then, with your permission, I will share our ways with those willing to listen — the Handbook, our songs, and the stories of Zarkov. Perhaps that will help them understand..."

traits.locale_text: {n}Vedka frunce el ceño y aprieta los labios en una delgada línea.{/n} «Entonces, con su permiso, compartiré nuestras costumbres con quien esté dispuesto a escucharlas: el manual, nuestras canciones y las historias de Zarkov. Así puede que lleguen a entendernos...».
